hook.text: OUR CAPTAIN STARTS AS PORTUGAL HELD 1-1

beats.text: BRUNO FERNANDES STARTED THE FULL 90 FOR PORTUGAL
JOAO NEVES GAVE PORTUGAL THE LEAD ON SIX MINUTES
DR CONGO EQUALISED THROUGH WISSA JUST BEFORE HALF-TIME
RONALDO PLAYED BUT FAILED TO SCORE IN HOUSTON

caption: United's captain on the world stage — and it wasn't the night Portugal expected 🔴 Bruno Fernandes started the full 90 minutes as Portugal were held to a shock 1-1 draw by DR Congo in their World Cup Group H opener in Houston. João Neves gave them the lead inside 6 minutes, but Yoane Wissa equalised just before the break. Cristiano Ronaldo — Old Trafford's greatest ever — played but couldn't find the net on his record-equalling sixth World Cup appearance. Two Red Devils in the Portugal squad: Bruno started, Dalot on the bench. Frustrating night but the group is wide open. Who do you think Portugal finish behind in the group? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #brunofernandes #portugal
